title: File your taxes
description: Filing taxes unlocks credits like GST/HST and can trigger automatic benefit payments.

title: Register for CRA My Account
description: Track returns, notice of assessments, and benefit payment details in one place.

title: Check your credit score
description: Use your bank or a free provider to monitor your score and spot errors early.

title: Apply for provincial student aid
description: Submit your province-specific student aid application before school deadlines.

title: Review rent support and budgeting programs
description: Check provincial renter supports and free financial literacy tools for monthly cash flow.

title: Start a debt repayment plan
description: List balances, target highest-interest debt first, and automate minimum payments.
